query:
SELECT 
  SUM(principal_amount) as total_principal,
  SUM(interest_amount) as total_interest,
  SUM(fee_amount) as total_fee,
  SUM(penalty_amount) as total_penalty,
  SUM(unlock_fee_amount) as total_unlock_fee,
  SUM(overpaid_amount) as total_overpaid,
  SUM(bad_debt_amount) as total_bad_debt,
  SUM(discount_amount) as total_discount,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_pt_amount,
  -- sum fields (รวม discount)
  SUM(principal_amount + interest_amount + fee_amount + penalty_amount + unlock_fee_amount + overpaid_amount) as sum_fields_no_bad_debt,
  -- sum fields - discount (= sum pt.amount)
  SUM(principal_amount + interest_amount + fee_amount + penalty_amount + unlock_fee_amount + overpaid_amount - discount_amount) as sum_fields_minus_discount,
  -- sum pt.amount + bad_debt
  SUM(total_amount) + SUM(bad_debt_amount) as total_with_bad_debt
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE total_amount > 0 OR bad_debt_amount > 0
